news.text: Volkswagen deal with EV maker Xpeng shows how China tech threatens Western automakers
Iranian missile hit oil tanker in Qatari waters, Qatar says - reuters.com
Airline Emirates says Iranian nationals barred from entering or transiting UAE - reuters.com
Australia's Albanese says war's economic shock will be felt for months; urges using public transport - reuters.com
India raises jet fuel, commercial LPG prices as Mideast crisis drives global surge - reuters.com
Iran war is both a boost and a threat to Australia's LNG - reuters.com

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Futures are ripping higher with the S&P up 2.91% and tech leading the charge at +4.24% as markets price in potential de-escalation of Iran conflict. VIX getting crushed down 8.84% to 35.7 signals risk-on sentiment returning, though we're still elevated from normal levels around 20.

◆ What to Watch

  • Iran Conflict Development - Multiple drone/missile strikes reported but markets betting on containment rather than escalation
  • Oil Reaction - Energy sector down 1.13% despite tanker hit in Qatar, suggesting supply disruption fears overblown
  • China Tech Spillover - VW-Xpeng partnership highlighting competitive pressure on Western automakers
  • LW Earnings (BMO) - Lamb Weston reports with EPS est 0.64, watch for consumer spending insights

◆ Sector Rotation

Classic risk-on rotation with tech (+4.24%) and industrials (+3.27%) leading while defensives lag badly. Energy getting hammered despite Middle East tensions as traders bet conflict stays regional. Small caps outperforming large caps suggests domestic growth optimism returning.
✦ Bull Case
Swift market recovery from geopolitical shock shows resilient risk appetite. Tech leadership with NASDAQ +3.39% suggests growth momentum intact.
⚡ Key Driver
Iran conflict resolution timeline will dictate whether this relief rally has legs or we retest yesterday's lows on any escalation headlines.
⚠ Bear Case
VIX still at 35.7 vs normal 20 level means volatility premium persists. One bad headline from Middle East could trigger swift reversal of these gains.

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY 655 - Key resistance, break above signals continuation of relief rally
  • QQQ 580 - Tech needs to reclaim this level to confirm leadership
  • VIX 30 - Breaking below would signal genuine risk-off unwinding
  • XLE 90 - Energy support level, break below confirms sector rotation out

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
